text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Mayano Top Gun's final showdown
with Narita Brian has arrived—the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she has grown into an even better racer,
her dream of "twinkling" has not changed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Clutching that dream, she heads off to race
Narita Brian.
